name: Dennis Muilenburg
bio: Dennis Muilenburg served as the Chairman, President, and CEO of The Boeing Company from 2015 until his ouster in December 2019 following the 737 MAX crisis.
_evidence: As CEO during the 737 MAX crisis, he was the primary public face defending the aircraft's safety and managing the company's response to the grounding.

name: Steve Dickson
bio: Steve Dickson was the Administrator of the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) from 2019 to 2022, leading the agency during the return-to-service of the Boeing 737 MAX.
_evidence: He oversaw the rigorous recertification process of the 737 MAX, balancing the need for safety with the pressure to return the fleet to service.

name: David Calhoun
bio: David Calhoun became the CEO of Boeing in January 2020, tasked with navigating the company through the aftermath of the 737 MAX grounding and the COVID-19 pandemic.
_evidence: He took over leadership to restore public trust and stabilize the company's operations following the grounding and the subsequent leadership vacuum.
